mapper.sql: A.NOPT_IP_MST_SEQ, A.NLVL_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ, A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.PIP_PREFIX, A.SIP_BLOCK, A.NBITMASK, A.NCNT , A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ_TAR, A.PIP_PREFIX_TAR, A.SIP_BLOCK_TAR, A.NBITMASK_TAR , A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID, NETWORK(INET(A.SIP_BLOCK || '/24')) VIRTUAL_PIP_PREFIX
, C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , D.SLVL_CD AS SSVC_GROUP_CD , D.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , E.SLVL_CD AS SSVC_OBJ_CD , E.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , F.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM
, A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , A.SSVC_GROUP_CD , A.SSVC_GROUP_NM , A.SSVC_OBJ_CD , A.SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM
, MST.TB_LVL_MST B , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD C , MST.TB_LVL_CD D , MST.TB_LVL_CD E , MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD F
AND A.NLVL_MST_SEQ = B.NLVL_MST_SEQ AND B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND B.SSVC_GROUP_CD = D.SLVL_CD(+) AND B.SSVC_OBJ_CD = E.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = F.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD(+)
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM FCT.TB_OPTIMIZATION_IP_MST A
AND A.PIP_PREFIX <<= #{searchWrd, javaType=Object, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kt.ipms.legacy.cmn.typehandler.CIDRTypeHandler}
ORDER BY A.DMODIFY_DT DESC

SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM FCT.TB_OPTIMIZATION_IP_MST A
AND A.PIP_PREFIX <<= #{searchWrd, javaType=Object, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kt.ipms.legacy.cmn.typehandler.CIDRTypeHandler}

SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM FCT.TB_OPTIMIZATION_IP_MST A
AND A.NLVL_MST_SEQ IN
#{item.nlvlSeq}
AND TEXT(A.PIP_PREFIX) LIKE #{searchWrd} || '%'
